subject: fix(platforms): correct 3 platform dimensions verified against current specs
body:
Web-searched all 13 new platform dimensions against official/authoritative
sources. 10 were correct, 3 needed updating:

1. YouTube End Screen: 1280×720 → 1920×1080
   Was using thumbnail size, not full end screen template size.
   Source: Snappa/Riverside YouTube outro guides (2026)

2. Product Square: 1000×1000 → 2000×2000
   1000px was Amazon's minimum. Modern e-commerce platforms (Shopify,
   Amazon, eBay) all recommend 2000px+ for zoom functionality.
   Source: Shopify/Squareshot product image guides (2026)

3. Product Portrait: 800×1200 → 1200×1800
   Too small for modern displays. Increased to match 2:3 ratio at
   a size that supports zoom on high-DPI screens.
   Source: Photoroom/Shopify image size guides (2026)

Tags: platforms, dimensions, data-accuracy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: todo-implementation
Semver: patch

title: correct 3 platform dimensions verified against current specs
